6. Demonstrate analytical thinking skills through the use and application of analytical and machine learning methods.

REQUIREMENTS Admitted Computer Science majors will begin the minor in their junior year and MATH240, MATH241, and STAT400 (or equivalent courses) should be completed prior to entering the program. CMSC320 (or an equivalent course) should be completed either prior to beginning the minor or during a student's ﬁrst semester in the minor.
